channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damaged pavement, 5th April
item.description:
New damage to the pavement right by skip.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Palatine Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garbage bags dumped!, 5th April
item.description:
There are numerous bags dumped illegally, about 20 to 25 black bags filled with rubbish!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin collection missed last week and 1 bin removed, 5th April
item.description:
Once again. This time the general waste was not collected. One of the recycling bins had a broken lid. We have asked for it to be replaced but the bin was removed and not yet replaced. Please collect general waste bin & replace the recycling bin. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilton Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip of small rubbish on small green next to 1 Duddington Close, 5th April
item.description:
This flytip has been here for about 3 weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duddington Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Major flytipping Crampton St bike lockers, 5th April
item.description:
On 5 April, there was a huge amount of flytipping by a white van that was moving items in and out of 50 Crampton St. The waste was dumped by the bike lockers.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Crampton Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bags and fence, 5th April
item.description:
2 piles of flytipped rubbish and fencing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cromford Path, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General rubbish and asbestos, 5th April
item.description:
Household rubbish. Van full 20or so asbestis roof sheet s

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shonks Mill Road, Navestock, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 inch pothole in road, 5th April
item.description:
Tarmac patch breaking up over old manhole cover. Roughly outside 605 Green Lanes near the River Avenue junction.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car battery, 5th April
item.description:
Dumped car battery

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evelina Road, Penge, Greater London

Dumped rubbish. Back of houses back of birkbeck Road sidcup

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdown Road, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipped, 5th April

Fly tipped mattress
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipped mattress, 5th April

Fly tipped mattress outside shops maple road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 83, Maple Road, Anerley, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 292-294, Kentish Town Road, Kentish Town, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cricket Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish been dumped by electic cupboard, 5th April

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Framlingham Crescent, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Loads of toys been dumped, 5th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Smarden Drove, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Fly tip of part of double bed, 5th April
item.description:
There is part of a dumped double bed base in park just off betts way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Betts Way, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black container bins not emptied, 5th April
item.description:
Black communal container bins not emptied when due to be.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vousden Grove, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car parts, 5th April
item.description:
Outside 62 samos road down by the garden fence there is a number of car brake parts left there is calipers and caliper mounting as well as brake pads.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samos Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on street, 5th April
item.description:
Opposite 39 Tudor Road outside the flats. There's lots of rubbish going onto the pavement blocking it and being spread across the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tudor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
